data.body:
**Completion verification: PASS** ‚Äî all 11 acceptance criteria (7 primary + 4 advisory) are met by the implementation.

**AC1 (five gates accept ref+source; attested reads snapshot, never working tree):** All five gates (`review_plan`, `verify_completion`, `review_ticket`, `review_code`, `scan_spec`) accept `ref`/`source` and call `gate_source.resolve_gate_handle` + `gate_source.apply_handle` within `gate_read_root`. Citations: `plan_review/__init__.py:83‚Äì95`, `completion.py:195‚Äì210`, `operations.py:121‚Äì166`, `code_review.py:133‚Äì156`, `spec_scan.py:64‚Äì80`, `gate_source.py:106‚Äì111`.

**AC2 (defaults origin/main+attested, configurable):** `default_ref`/`default_source` in `gate_source.py:67‚Äì76` resolve via `REBAR_GATE_REF`/`REBAR_GATE_SOURCE` env ‚Üí `[snapshot]` config table ‚Üí documented defaults. Tests at `test_gate_source_threading.py:166‚Äì188` confirm env and config-file paths.

**AC3 (all three dispatch touchpoints consume the snapshot handle):** The `use_code_root` context-var (`config.py:44‚Äì68`) is set by `gate_read_root` for attested runs; `LLMConfig.from_env` checks `current_code_root()` first (`config.py:314‚Äì317`). `gate_ops.completion_reconcile` and `completion_precheck` both call `LLMConfig.from_env` (gate_ops.py:60,104) inside the active context; `operations._assemble_context` is called from within the context at gate_ops.py:76. Test `test_context_code_root_reroots_deep_from_env` (threading test:191‚Äì205) verifies the mechanism explicitly.

**AC4 (local mode: in-place checkout, unsigned, repo_root as read root):** `materialize(SOURCE_LOCAL)` returns `SnapshotHandle(path=repo_root, sha=None)` (repo_snapshot.py:519‚Äì525); `signable` property returns `False` when sha is None (repo_snapshot.py:197‚Äì200); `gate_read_root` skips the context-set for local (gate_source.py:99‚Äì103). Test `test_local_mode_reads_checkout_and_is_unsigned` (threading test:144‚Äì160) asserts `signable=False`, `verified_at_sha=None`, and `runner.captured_repo_path == repo`.

**AC5 (review_code uses single snapshot at single ref):** `effective_ref = ref if ref is not None else head` (code_review.py:139‚Äì140) ‚Äî one ref for the snapshot. Comment at code_review.py:173‚Äì176 explicitly states the single-ref design. The diff computation uses `base..head` for diff text only, file reads go through the snapshot.

**AC6 (gate tolerates absent/GC'd snapshot by re-materializing):** `cache.acquire` re-materializes when the entry dir is absent (cache.py:186‚Äì200). Test `test_gate_rematerializes_absent_snapshot` (threading test:211‚Äì221) uses `shutil.rmtree` to simulate eviction and confirms re-materialization. `test_deleted_entry_self_heals` (test_snapshot_cache.py:181‚Äì189) also covers this.

**AC7 (regression test: attested verdict identical regardless of checked-out branch):** `test_attested_reads_pinned_ref_regardless_of_checkout_branch` and `test_attested_verdict_identical_across_checkout_branches` (threading test:93‚Äì138) set up a repo where origin/main has `sentinel.txt="from-main\n"` and the checked-out branch has `"from-other\n"`, and assert the gate reads origin/main's content in both checkout states ‚Äî directly reproducing and proving the fix for the wrong-branch false-negative.

**Advisory ACs:** Defaults via REBAR_GATE_* + [snapshot] config (confirmed above). ENOENT test: `test_deleted_entry_self_heals` + `test_gate_rematerializes_absent_snapshot`. Local-mode unsigned test: `test_local_mode_reads_checkout_and_is_unsigned`. Rollback doc: `docs/adr/0005-snapshot-cache-architecture.md:98` + `gate_source.py:12‚Äì14` + `transition.py:235‚Äì240`.

CLI close gate (`transition.py:241`) passes `source="local"` to `verify_completion`, confirming the single-developer verify-before-push path. `conftest.py:202‚Äì215` defaults offline tests to `REBAR_GATE_SOURCE=local` so attested tests are explicitly opt-in.
